name: nginx-multisite
description: Configures Nginx as a multi-site web server with SSL-enabled virtual hosts, self-signed TLS certificate generation, strict TLS policies, security headers, UFW firewall, fail2ban intrusion prevention, kernel sysctl hardening, and SSH hardening for three internal cluster subdomains.

name: cache
description: Provisions a dual caching layer by configuring Memcached (via community cookbook) and Redis (via redisio community cookbook) with password authentication, correct log directory ownership, and a post-install workaround that strips deprecated Redis config directives to prevent startup failures.

name: fastapi-tutorial
description: Deploys a Python FastAPI application cloned from GitHub into a Python virtual environment running uvicorn, provisions a local PostgreSQL database with a dedicated role and database, writes a .env credentials file, and manages the application as a systemd service.
